dimensions.name: Gradio Interface Design
dimensions.description: Evaluates appropriate choice of Gradio input/output components for the use case. Text inputs should use gr.Textbox with appropriate lines parameter. Chat interfaces should use gr.ChatInterface or gr.Chatbot with proper message format (list of [user, bot] tuples). File uploads should use gr.File with type restrictions. Components should have descriptive labels and placeholder text. The interface should have a title and description. Shared=True for deployment, share=False for local dev.

dimensions.name: LLM Response Formatting
dimensions.description: Evaluates how LLM responses are displayed to users. Markdown should be rendered when using gr.Markdown or gr.Chatbot (which renders markdown by default). Streaming responses should use generator functions with `yield` for incremental display rather than blocking until the full response arrives. Long responses should not overflow the UI container. Code blocks in responses should be syntax-highlighted. The interface should handle multi-turn conversation history correctly if applicable.
